requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant (R-600a / isobutane) flammable-charge safety and environmental controls for Ghana
requirement_topic.zh: 加纳制冷剂（R-600a/异丁烷）可燃充注量安全及环境管控
requirement_topic.zht: 迦納製冷劑（R-600a/異丁烷）可燃充注量安全及環境管控

summary.en: Ghana does not run an EU-style F-Gas quota/phase-down regime, but refrigerant use in refrigerators is governed on two tracks. （1） Safety: R-600a （isobutane） is a flammable （A3） hydrocarbon refrigerant; its charge and appliance construction are controlled through the GS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 （particular requirements for refrigerating appliances）, which sets the refrigerant-charge limits, marking, and flammable-refrigerant construction requirements assessed within GSA conformity assessment. This is the primary, mandatory control point for R-600a in Ghana. （2） Environment/ozone: Ghana is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, implemented through the Environmental Protection Authority （EPA） ozone/HFC controls and import licensing for controlled substances; these target HCFC/HFC （e.g. R-134a） rather than hydrocarbon R-600a, so a hydrocarbon-charged fridge is favourably positioned. There is no Ghana equivalent of the EU F-Gas Regulation's GWP-based quota for placing equipment on the market.
summary.zh: 加纳不实行欧盟式的氟气体配额/削减制度，但冰箱制冷剂使用受两条线管控。（1）安全：R-600a（异丁烷）为可燃（A3）烃类制冷剂；其充注量与器具结构通过GS转化的IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具的特殊要求）管控，该标准规定制冷剂充注量限值、标识及可燃制冷剂结构要求，并在GSA合格评定内评定。这是R-600a在加纳的首要强制管控点。（2）环境/臭氧：加纳是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过环境保护局（EPA）的臭氧/HFC管控及受控物质进口许可实施；这些针对HCFC/HFC（如R-134a）而非烃类R-600a，故充注烃类的冰箱处于有利地位。加纳没有相当于欧盟氟气体法规、基于GWP的设备投放市场配额。
summary.zht: 迦納不實行歐盟式的氟氣體配額/削減制度，但冰箱製冷劑使用受兩條線管控。（1）安全：R-600a（異丁烷）為可燃（A3）烴類製冷劑；其充注量與器具結構通過GS轉化的IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具的特殊要求）管控，該標準規定製冷劑充注量限值、標識及可燃製冷劑結構要求，並在GSA合格評定內評定。這是R-600a在迦納的首要強制管控點。（2）環境/臭氧：迦納是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過環境保護局（EPA）的臭氧/HFC管控及受控物質進口許可實施；這些針對HCFC/HFC（如R-134a）而非烴類R-600a，故充注烴類的冰箱處於有利地位。迦納沒有相當於歐盟氟氣體法規、基於GWP的設備投放市場配額。

standards_or_laws: GS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — Household refrigerating appliances — Annex addressing flammable refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, marking and construction
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Ghana as a Party (HCFC/HFC phase-down)
Ghana Environmental Protection Authority (EPA) — ozone-depleting/HFC substance controls and import licensing
No Ghana equivalent of the EU F-Gas Regulation (EU) 517/2014 GWP quota for equipment placement

summary.en: China controls flammable-refrigerant safety for refrigerators through GB 4706.13 （particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, the GB equivalent/adoption of IEC 60335-2-24）, which sets the R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant construction/marking rules verified under CCC. On the environmental side, China is also a Party to the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment, with HCFC/HFC controls administered domestically （MEE/quota and phase-down management）. R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Chinese-built domestic refrigerators, so a typical CCC-certified Chinese fridge is already engineered around the IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-charge approach — the technical safety basis is closely aligned with what Ghana's GS standard requires.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 4706.13（制冷器具的特殊要求，等同/转化IEC 60335-2-24）管控冰箱可燃制冷剂安全，该标准规定R-600a充注量限值及可燃制冷剂结构/标识规则，并在CCC下核验。环境方面，中国同为《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》缔约方，国内对HCFC/HFC实施管控（生态环境部/配额与削减管理）。R-600a是中国制造家用冰箱的主流制冷剂，故典型CCC认证中国冰箱已围绕IEC 60335-2-24可燃充注方法设计——技术安全基础与加纳GS标准要求高度一致。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 4706.13（製冷器具的特殊要求，等同/轉化IEC 60335-2-24）管控冰箱可燃製冷劑安全，該標準規定R-600a充注量限值及可燃製冷劑結構/標識規則，並在CCC下核驗。環境方面，中國同為《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》締約方，國內對HCFC/HFC實施管控（生態環境部/配額與削減管理）。R-600a是中國製造家用冰箱的主流製冷劑，故典型CCC認證中國冰箱已圍繞IEC 60335-2-24可燃充注方法設計——技術安全基礎與迦納GS標準要求高度一致。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (GB equivalent/adoption of IEC 60335-2-24; flammable R-600a charge limits and marking; verified under CCC)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — China as a Party; HCFC/HFC controls administered by MEE
R-600a as the dominant refrigerant in Chinese domestic refrigerators

gap.en: The refrigerant position is favourable but not automatic. (1) Standard alignment — because both GB 4706.13 and Ghana's GS standard derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the R-600a charge limits, marking and flammable-refrigerant construction are technically the same basis; the work is to re-evidence this within GSA conformity assessment, not to re-engineer. (2) Charge documentation — the specific charge mass, marking and the flammable-refrigerant Annex compliance must be documented against the GS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 edition and presented to GSA; CCC test data must be re-packaged, not relied on directly. (3) No F-Gas quota — unlike the EU, Ghana does not impose a GWP quota on equipment placement, so an R-600a fridge faces no phase-down barrier; an R-134a unit would instead engage EPA HFC import controls. (4) Environmental licensing — confirm whether the EPA import-licensing regime touches the consignment (mainly relevant if any controlled HFC/HCFC is involved).
gap.zh: 制冷剂方面条件有利但非自动。（1）标准一致——因GB 4706.13与加纳GS标准均源于IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限值、标识及可燃制冷剂结构技术基础相同；工作在于在GSA合格评定内重新举证，而非重新设计。（2）充注量文件——具体充注质量、标识及可燃制冷剂附录的符合性须依GS采纳的IEC 60335-2-24版本记录并提交GSA；CCC检测数据须重新组织，不可直接依赖。（3）无氟气体配额——与欧盟不同，加纳不对设备投放市场施加GWP配额，故R-600a冰箱无削减壁垒；而R-134a产品则触及EPA的HFC进口管控。（4）环境许可——确认EPA进口许可制度是否涉及该货物（主要在涉及任何受控HFC/HCFC时相关）。
gap.zht: 製冷劑方面條件有利但非自動。（1）標準一致——因GB 4706.13與迦納GS標準均源於IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限值、標識及可燃製冷劑結構技術基礎相同；工作在於在GSA合格評定內重新舉證，而非重新設計。（2）充注量文件——具體充注質量、標識及可燃製冷劑附錄的符合性須依GS採納的IEC 60335-2-24版本記錄並提交GSA；CCC檢測數據須重新組織，不可直接依賴。（3）無氟氣體配額——與歐盟不同，迦納不對設備投放市場施加GWP配額，故R-600a冰箱無削減壁壘；而R-134a產品則觸及EPA的HFC進口管控。（4）環境許可——確認EPA進口許可制度是否涉及該貨物（主要在涉及任何受控HFC/HCFC時相關）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (safety) — R-600a charge limits, marking and flammable-refrigerant construction assessed under GS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 within GSA conformity assessment. No EU-style F-Gas GWP quota; EPA Montreal/Kigali import controls apply mainly to HCFC/HFC, not hydrocarbon R-600a.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4706.13 mandatory (CCC) for flammable-refrigerant safety; China a Montreal/Kigali Party with MEE HCFC/HFC controls

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An R-600a refrigerator is well-positioned for Ghana: Ghana has no EU-style F-Gas GWP quota, and EPA Montreal/Kigali import controls bite mainly on HCFC/HFC (e.g. R-134a), not hydrocarbon R-600a. Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Ghana's GS standard derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the flammable-charge safety basis is aligned, but the specific charge mass, marking and flammable-refrigerant Annex compliance must be re-documented and presented within GSA conformity assessment rather than relying on CCC data directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a冰箱在加纳条件良好：加纳无欧盟式氟气体GWP配额，EPA的蒙特利尔/基加利进口管控主要针对HCFC/HFC（如R-134a），而非烃类R-600a。由于中国GB 4706.13与加纳GS标准均源于IEC 60335-2-24，可燃充注安全基础一致，但具体充注质量、标识及可燃制冷剂附录符合性须在GSA合格评定内重新记录与提交，而非直接依赖CCC数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a冰箱在迦納條件良好：迦納無歐盟式氟氣體GWP配額，EPA的蒙特利爾/基加利進口管控主要針對HCFC/HFC（如R-134a），而非烴類R-600a。由於中國GB 4706.13與迦納GS標準均源於IEC 60335-2-24，可燃充注安全基礎一致，但具體充注質量、標識及可燃製冷劑附錄符合性須在GSA合格評定內重新記錄與提交，而非直接依賴CCC數據。
